description: Mattermost is open at the login screen in the web browser. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. Navigate to the 'Release Updates' channel in the 'Main Team' workspace. Find the release announcement message that was posted most recently in the channel (the last message at the bottom, which is the v11.4.3 release) and pin it to the channel. The message should appear in the channel's pinned messages after pinning.
